lastfup.title: Year of last available follow up
lastfup.description: Year of last follow up based on (1) most recent year cancer registry was linked/checked, (2) end of cohort study period, (3) date of death, or (4) other loss to follow up.

lastfup_reason.title: Reason for last follow up date
lastfup_reason.$comment: Source coding: 1 - Year of last cancer registry linkage; 2 - End of cohort study period; 3 - Death; 4 - Withdrew from cohort; 888 - Missing/Unknown.

oneOf.title: Year of last cancer registry linkage
